title: Subtitle Hub – Stremio Addon
subtitle: Personalize your subtitle experience with multiple providers
step_welcome_desc: Configure your subtitle addon in a few easy steps.
step_providers_desc: Choose and enable subtitle providers. Some require API keys.
step_advanced_desc: Fine-tune advanced options like hearing-impaired subtitles and release matching.
hi_desc: Include hearing impaired (SDH) subtitles when available.
release_desc: Match subtitles to your specific video release for better sync.
mt_desc: Automatically translate subtitles if none are found in your language.
priority_desc: Drag to reorder the priority in which providers are queried.
profiles_desc: Save and switch between different configuration profiles.
import_error: Failed to import configuration. Please check the file format.
presets_desc: Quick-start with popular configurations curated by the community.
security_text: Your API keys are embedded in the addon URL. Share the URL only with trusted devices.
editing_banner: You are editing an existing configuration
editing_desc: Changes will update your addon URL. Install again in Stremio to apply.
